/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libvel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vel_forwarder/msg/detail/vel__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vel_forwarder/msg/detail/buff_data__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vel_forwarder/msg/detail/game_data__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vel_forwarder/msg/detail/gimbal_angles__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vel_forwarder/msg/detail/health__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vel_forwarder/msg/detail/position_data__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vel_forwarder/msg/detail/uwb_pos__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
